creator: oleglelchuk@gmail.com
text: After updating to the latest kernel, I still haven't been able to trigger the bug even after many attempts (typing "kldunload if_iwlwifi" or "ifconfig wlan0 up" early hasn't triggered the bug even after many attempts). I don't know why. In my previous message, I said that the bug was sometimes triggered and sometimes it wasn't, but today, I haven't been able to trigger it at all.
